observations.note: All 31 integration tests pass covering 5 component interaction categories: dev lifecycle, QA lifecycle, cross-workflow isolation, CLI-to-PhaseState end-to-end, and WORKFLOW_SCHEMAS consistency.

complete_workflow_phase() (STORY-521 unified path) does not enforce subagent requirements — enforcement only exists in the legacy complete_phase() method. This design choice means the unified CLI path bypasses subagent gate-keeping. The test was corrected to document actual behavior rather than assumed behavior.

WORKFLOW_SCHEMAS registry cleanly drives both create_workflow() and complete_workflow_phase() — adding a new workflow only requires a schema entry without touching CLI code. This is a strong extensibility pattern.
